languages.text: {n}Заряд автопистолета слегка опаляет вам волосы, но пролетает мимо. Сраженная ответным выстрелом женщина валится навзничь. Как только ее тело касается пола, фигуры вокруг вас приходят в движение, Иокаста отрывисто отдает приказы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: так ей и надо от аугментатора

languages.text: {n}An autopistol round lightly singes your hair, but misses you. The woman falls to the ground, hit by the return shot. As her body hits the deck, the figures around you move, Sauerback barking orders.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Заряд автопистолета слегка опаляет вам волосы, но пролетает мимо. Сраженная ответным выстрелом женщина валится навзничь. Как только ее тело касается пола, фигуры вокруг вас приходят в движение, Иокаста отрывисто отдает приказы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}An autopistol round lightly singes your hair, but misses you. The woman falls to the ground, hit by the return shot. As her body hits the deck, the figures around you move, Sauerback barking orders.{/n}

{n}A laspistol charge round lightly singes your hair, but misses you. The woman falls to the ground, hit by the return shot. As her body hits the deck, the figures around you move, Sauerback barking orders.{/n}

{n}An autopistol round lightly singes your hair, but misses you. The woman falls to the ground, hit by the return shot. As her body hits the deck, the figures around you move, Sauerback barking orders.{/n}

languages.text: {n}銃弾のチャージが軽く髪を焦がす。しかし、あなたは撃たれなかった。その女性は、返り討ちに倒れ、その体勢が床に落ちると、周囲の人たちが動き、ザウアーバックが指示を叫ぶ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A laspistol charge round lightly singes your hair, but misses you. The woman falls to the ground, hit by the return shot. As her body hits the deck, the figures around you move, Sauerback barking orders.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 銃弾のチャージが軽く髪を焦がす。しかし、あなたは撃たれなかった。その女性は、返り討ちに倒れ、その体勢が床に落ちると、周囲の人たちが動き、ザウアーバックが指示を叫ぶ。

languages.text: {n}Bir ototabanca mermisi saçını hafifçe yaksa da ıska geçiyor. Kadın, karşı atışla vurularak yere düşüyor. Vücudu güverteye çarpar çarpmaz etrafındaki figürler hareketleniyor, Sauerback emirler yağdırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An autopistol round lightly singes your hair, but misses you. The woman falls to the ground, hit by the return shot. As her body hits the deck, the figures around you move, Sauerback barking orders.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir ototabanca mermisi saçını hafifçe yaksa da ıska geçiyor. Kadın, karşı atışla vurularak yere düşüyor. Vücudu güverteye çarpar çarpmaz etrafındaki figürler hareketleniyor, Sauerback emirler yağdırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un disparo de pistola automática quema ligeramente tu pelo, pero no da en el blanco. La mujer cae al suelo, alcanzada por el disparo en represalia. En cuanto su cuerpo toca la cubierta, las figuras que te rodean empiezan a moverse y Sauerback ladra sus órdenes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An autopistol round lightly singes your hair, but misses you. The woman falls to the ground, hit by the return shot. As her body hits the deck, the figures around you move, Sauerback barking orders.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un disparo de pistola automática quema ligeramente tu pelo, pero no da en el blanco. La mujer cae al suelo, alcanzada por el disparo en represalia. En cuanto su cuerpo toca la cubierta, las figuras que te rodean empiezan a moverse y Sauerback ladra sus órdenes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一发子弹擦焦了你的发梢，但没打中你。女人随即遭到反击，中弹倒地。她的身体一触及甲板，周围的人影就行动起来，苏尔贝克大声吼出命令。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An autopistol round lightly singes your hair, but misses you. The woman falls to the ground, hit by the return shot. As her body hits the deck, the figures around you move, Sauerback barking orders.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一发子弹擦焦了你的发梢，但没打中你。女人随即遭到反击，中弹倒地。她的身体一触及甲板，周围的人影就行动起来，苏尔贝克大声吼出命令。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une balle de pistolet-mitrailleur vous frôle en brûlant légèrement vos cheveux, puis la femme s'effondre, abattue par un tir de riposte. À l'instant où son corps touche le pont, tout le monde autour de vous se remet à bouger tandis que Sauerback lance des ordres.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An autopistol round lightly singes your hair, but misses you. The woman falls to the ground, hit by the return shot. As her body hits the deck, the figures around you move, Sauerback barking orders.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une balle de pistolet-mitrailleur vous frôle en brûlant légèrement vos cheveux, puis la femme s'effondre, abattue par un tir de riposte. À l'instant où son corps touche le pont, tout le monde autour de vous se remet à bouger tandis que Sauerback lance des ordres.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein Schuss aus der Maschinenpistole verfehlt dich um Haaresbreite. Die Frau fällt zu Boden, von dem Rückschuss getroffen. Als ihr Körper auf dem Deck aufschlägt, kommt Bewegung in die Personen um dich herum, Sauerback brüllt Befehle.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}An autopistol round lightly singes your hair, but misses you. The woman falls to the ground, hit by the return shot. As her body hits the deck, the figures around you move, Sauerback barking orders.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein Schuss aus der Maschinenpistole verfehlt dich um Haaresbreite. Die Frau fällt zu Boden, von dem Rückschuss getroffen. Als ihr Körper auf dem Deck aufschlägt, kommt Bewegung in die Personen um dich herum, Sauerback brüllt Befehle.{/n}
